form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr6) over 1177m at this track, beaten 21 m by Major Dalton (1:23.60) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 6 at $21. At his previous start 10th (Fr1) over 1177m at this track, beaten 60 m by Swanbourne Spunk (1:22.40) in NR up to 55 on March 30 at $3.50. Drawn favourably and is worth another chance.
